task_commands.name: Наличие public/robots.txt, sitemap.xml, og.png
task_commands.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const paths=['public/robots.txt','public/sitemap.xml','public/og.png']; for (const p of paths){ if(!fs.existsSync(p)){ console.error('Missing:', p); process.exit(1);} } console.log('OK:', paths.length, 'files');"
